name: Avatar
description: A circular image or fallback representing a user or entity. Built on Base UI Avatar with StyleX styling.

Root.description: Outer container — a 40px circle with overflow hidden.

Image.description: The avatar image. Hidden automatically when the image fails to load.

Fallback.description: Content displayed when no image is provided or the image fails to load. Typically initials or an icon.

intents.reasoning: Avatar displays a user's photo with automatic fallback to initials when the image is unavailable.
Avatar Fallback renders initials on a muted background when no image is available.
Avatar Fallback can render an icon SVG as a generic placeholder for anonymous or system users.

avoidWhen.reasoning: Avatar is semantically for identity. Use a plain or a Card image for content images.
Avatar is 40px by default and circular. For large images use a dedicated hero/banner component.

avoidWhen.scenario: Selectable user lists or user pickers
avoidWhen.reasoning: Avatar is presentational only. Wrap it inside a Checkbox, Radio, or Listbox item for selectable lists.
avoidWhen.alternative: Checkbox, Radio, or Listbox with Avatar inside

examples.name: initials
examples.description: Initials fallback when no image is provided

examples.name: broken-image
examples.description: Broken image URL falls back automatically

examples.name: custom-size
examples.code:
const lg = stylex.create({ avatar: { width: '64px', height: '64px' } });

<Avatar.Root sx={lg.avatar}>
  <Avatar.Image src="/photo.jpg" alt="Jane Doe" />
  <Avatar.Fallback>JD</Avatar.Fallback>
</Avatar.Root>
